text_zh: 生活不是等待暴风雨过去，而是学会在雨中跳舞。
text_en: Life isn't about waiting for the storm to pass, it's about learning to dance in the rain.
author: 维维安·格林

text_zh: 不要因为走得太远，而忘记为什么出发。
text_en: Don't forget why you started just because you've gone too far.
author: 纪伯伦

text_zh: 世上无难事，只怕有心人。
text_en: Nothing in the world is difficult for one who sets his mind to it.
author: 中国谚语

text_zh: 知识就是力量。
text_en: Knowledge is power.
author: 弗朗西斯·培根

text_zh: 己所不欲，勿施于人。
text_en: Do not do unto others what you would not have them do unto you.
author: 孔子

text_zh: 想象力比知识更重要。
text_en: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
author: 阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦

text_zh: 千里之行，始于足下。
text_en: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: 老子

text_zh: 成功不是终点，失败也并非末日，重要的是继续前行的勇气。
text_en: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: 温斯顿·丘吉尔

text_zh: 学而不思则罔，思而不学则殆。
text_en: Learning without thinking is useless; thinking without learning is dangerous.
author: 孔子

text_zh: 生命中最重要的事情不是所站的位置，而是所朝的方向。
text_en: The most important thing in life is not where you stand, but the direction you're heading.
author: 奥利弗·温德尔·霍姆斯

text_zh: 天才是百分之一的灵感加上百分之九十九的汗水。
text_en: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
author: 托马斯·爱迪生

text_zh: 吾生也有涯，而知也无涯。
text_en: My life is limited, but knowledge is limitless.
author: 庄子

text_zh: 世界上最快乐的事，莫过于为理想而奋斗。
text_en: The happiest thing in the world is to strive for an ideal.
author: 苏格拉底

text_zh: 一个人可以被毁灭，但不能被打败。
text_en: A man can be destroyed but not defeated.
author: 欧内斯特·海明威

text_zh: 海纳百川，有容乃大。
text_en: The sea can hold hundreds of rivers because of its capacity.
author: 林则徐

text_zh: 时间就是生命，无端地消耗别人的时间，其实无异于谋财害命。
text_en: Time is life; wasting other people's time is tantamount to murder.
author: 鲁迅

text_zh: 你不能控制风的方向，但你可以调整帆的角度。
text_en: You can't control the direction of the wind, but you can adjust your sails.
author: 吉米·迪恩

text_zh: 读书破万卷，下笔如有神。
text_en: Reading ten thousand books is like having a divine pen.
author: 杜甫

text_zh: 真正的智慧不是预见未来，而是知道如何面对现在。
text_en: True wisdom is not predicting the future, but knowing how to face the present.
author: 托马斯·卡莱尔

text_zh: 人生没有彩排，每一天都是现场直播。
text_en: Life has no rehearsals; every day is a live broadcast.
author: 佚名

text_zh: 有志者事竟成。
text_en: Where there is a will, there is a way.
author: 中国谚语

text_zh: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
text_en: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
author: 史蒂夫·乔布斯

text_zh: 不入虎穴，焉得虎子。
text_en: If you don't enter the tiger's den, how can you get the tiger's cub?
author: 班超

text_zh: 路漫漫其修远兮，吾将上下而求索。
text_en: The road ahead is long; I shall search high and low.
author: 屈原

text_zh: 创造力是看到别人看到的，想到别人没想到的。
text_en: Creativity is seeing what others see and thinking what no one else ever thought.
author: 阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦

text_zh: 三人行，必有我师焉。
text_en: Among any three people walking, I will find something to learn.
author: 孔子

text_zh: 每一个不曾起舞的日子，都是对生命的辜负。
text_en: Every day that we don't dance is a day we betray our life.
author: 弗里德里希·尼采

text_zh: 逆境是到达真理的第一条道路。
text_en: Adversity is the first path to truth.
author: 拜伦

text_zh: 纸上得来终觉浅，绝知此事要躬行。
text_en: What's learned from books is shallow; true knowledge comes from practice.
author: 陆游

text_zh: 教育不是注满一桶水，而是点燃一把火。
text_en: Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire.
author: 威廉·巴特勒·叶芝

text_zh: 志当存高远。
text_en: Aim high in your ambitions.
author: 诸葛亮

text_zh: 人生如逆旅，我亦是行人。
text_en: Life is like a journey; I am also a traveler.
author: 苏轼

text_zh: 真正的勇气不是不害怕，而是害怕时仍然前进。
text_en: True courage is not being fearless, but moving forward despite the fear.
author: 纳尔逊·曼德拉

text_zh: 知人者智，自知者明。
text_en: Knowing others is wisdom; knowing oneself is enlightenment.
author: 老子

text_zh: 温故而知新，可以为师矣。
text_en: Reviewing the old to learn the new makes one a teacher.
author: 孔子

text_zh: 勿以善小而不为，勿以恶小而为之。
text_en: Do not fail to do good even if it's small; do not engage in evil even if it's small.
author: 刘备

text_zh: 最困难的时候，就是距离成功不远了。
text_en: The darkest hour is just before the dawn.
author: 中国谚语

text_zh: 简朴是智者的生活哲学。
text_en: Simplicity is the philosopher's way of life.
author: 亚里士多德

text_zh: 你的时间有限，不要浪费在过别人的生活上。
text_en: Your time is limited; don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: 史蒂夫·乔布斯

text_zh: 一寸光阴一寸金，寸金难买寸光阴。
text_en: An inch of time is an inch of gold; an inch of gold cannot buy an inch of time.
author: 中国谚语

text_zh: 每一个伟大的梦想，都始于一个梦想家。
text_en: Every great dream begins with a dreamer.
author: 哈丽特·塔布曼

text_zh: 学如逆水行舟，不进则退。
text_en: Learning is like rowing upstream; not advancing means falling back.
author: 中国谚语

text_zh: 没有人能回到过去重新开始，但任何人都可以从今天开始创造一个全新的结局。
text_en: No one can go back and start a new beginning, but anyone can start today and make a new ending.
author: 玛丽亚·罗宾逊

text_zh: 山重水复疑无路，柳暗花明又一村。
text_en: Beyond the mountains and rivers, another village appears.
author: 陆游

text_zh: 做你害怕做的事，然后你会发现恐惧不过如此。
text_en: Do what you fear and the fear will disappear.
author: 拉尔夫·沃尔多·爱默生

text_zh: 读万卷书，行万里路。
text_en: Read ten thousand books, travel ten thousand miles.
author: 刘彝

text_zh: 大鹏一日同风起，扶摇直上九万里。
text_en: The great bird rises with the wind, soaring ninety thousand miles.
author: 李白

text_zh: 人生最大的光荣不在于永不失败，而在于能屡败屡战。
text_en: The greatest glory in life lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: 纳尔逊·曼德拉

text_zh: 一切伟大的行动和思想，都有一个微不足道的开始。
text_en: All great actions and thoughts have a humble beginning.
author: 阿尔贝·加缪
